summary: Prompt 2.6-FE (BCR Workflow Frontend) end-to-end Playwright smoke against the live preview URL as test-pm@example.test. ALL 15 review-request scenarios PASS. The three BudgetDetail tabs render correctly with ?tab= URL-param sync, BCR queue + filter chips work, BCR-0001 (seeded Draft Transfer £5k/£10k gross) opens at /budget-changes/<id> with correct testids/values, two-step Submit→Approve→Apply lifecycle wiring is intact, self-approval guard fires for the creator at the £10k boundary (bcr-actions-approve-self-disabled shown, approve/reject buttons hidden), Create dialog Transfer/Adjustment validators behave correctly (net=£0 for Transfer; adjust-warn shows at delta=0 and clears at non-zero), Change Log tab lists all 3 BCRs as bcr-change-log-row-* rows, Withdraw dialog → Withdrawn pill works and terminal-state buttons disappear, and all BCR API calls are pinned to /api/v1/budget-changes/* — 0 path violations.

design_issues.screen: All Radix DialogContent usages (CreateBudgetChangeDialog, BCRRejectDialog, EditBCRDialog, withdraw confirm)
issues: Radix a11y warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}'. Non-blocking but noisy in console. Add DialogDescription or aria-describedby.
React warning: 'Select is changing from uncontrolled to controlled' on change-type + line-pickers. Initial value should default to '' instead of undefined to keep the input controlled from mount.

verified_scenarios.login_test_pm: PASS — landed on /entities (PM has perms, no MFA enrollment, no /auth/me 403)
verified_scenarios.bcr_queue_surface: PASS — bcr-queue, bcr-queue-filters, bcr-queue-new-btn present on tab=changes
verified_scenarios.bcr_0001_visible_under_show_all: PASS — bcr-queue-row-BCR-0001 + bcr-status-pill-Draft render after clicking 'All' chip
verified_scenarios.bcr_detail_navigation: PASS — link routes to /budget-changes/<id>; bcr-detail / bcr-detail-reference='BCR-0001' / bcr-status-pill-Draft / bcr-detail-net-impact='£0.00' / bcr-detail-lines with 2 rows
verified_scenarios.draft_action_matrix: PASS — edit/submit/withdraw shown; approve NOT shown
verified_scenarios.self_approval_guard_at_10k_boundary: PASS — as creator on £10k-gross Transfer, bcr-actions-approve-self-disabled shown; bcr-actions-approve-btn + bcr-actions-reject-btn NOT shown (matches >= threshold behaviour)
verified_scenarios.create_transfer_via_ui: PASS — bcr-create-dialog opens; +500/-500 lines → bcr-line-editor-net='£0.00' with no warning; submit closes dialog; new BCR appears in queue
verified_scenarios.adjustment_invariant_warning: PASS — bcr-line-editor-adjust-warn shows at delta=0 then clears at delta=100; submit succeeds
verified_scenarios.change_log_tab: PASS — budget-detail-tab-body-change-log + bcr-change-log with 3 bcr-change-log-row-* rows
verified_scenarios.withdraw_flow: PASS — bcr-withdraw-dialog opens, confirm → bcr-status-pill-Withdrawn; no action buttons render on terminal Withdrawn
verified_scenarios.status_pill_colour_mapping: PASS — STATUS_CLASSES in BCRStatusPill.jsx matches spec (Draft slate / Submitted amber / Approved sky / Applied emerald / Rejected rose / Withdrawn muted slate)
verified_scenarios.api_path_pin: PASS — all BCR network requests use /api/v1/budget-changes... (0 violations observed)

action_items: (P3 — design observation) Frontend self-approval guard is binary: BCRActionButtons.jsx:117 shows bcr-actions-approve-self-disabled for ANY creator regardless of gross. The backend rule (services/budget_changes.py:520) is gross(sum(abs(delta))) >= threshold (default £10k). UI is therefore strictly more restrictive than the API for BCRs whose gross is below £10k — a PM-creator could not self-approve a £200 BCR via UI even though the API would allow it. For BCR-0001 at exactly £10k gross this happens to match (>= boundary), so this slice's test passes. Confirm whether the binary UI guard is intentional for this slice or if the UI should mirror the gross-threshold check.
(P4) Suppress the Radix Dialog a11y warnings by adding a <DialogDescription> (or aria-describedby) to CreateBudgetChangeDialog / BCRRejectDialog / EditBCRDialog / withdraw confirm dialogs.
(P4) Fix 'uncontrolled→controlled' React warnings on Select components in CreateBudgetChangeDialog + BCRLineEditor — pass an empty string default instead of undefined.
critical_code_review_comments: BCRActionButtons.jsx is well-factored and mirrors POActionButtons pattern — single source of truth for the action matrix. The two-step Approve→Apply UX hint (bcr-awaiting-apply-hint) is good user education.

BudgetChangeQueue 'Open' composite filter is implemented client-side over the unfiltered fetch — fine at the bounded /api/v1/budget-changes?budget_id=… (200-cap) but flag for the cross-project queue when B51 lands.

Frontend mirrors backend invariants in validateBeforeSubmit (Transfer net=0, ContingencyDrawdown net=0 + source must be is_contingency, Adjustment net!=0) — good defence in depth. Backend remains the authority on 422.
fmtGBP(net) ?? '£0.00' pattern is safe — net is always a finite number from netOf, so the nullish fallback is a paranoid guard not a real branch.

BudgetChangeDetail back-link uses /projects/_/budgets/<budgetId>?tab=changes with a literal '_' projectId — works because BudgetDetail loads by budget id, but consider passing the actual project id from router state if available (it already is via state={{ projectId, budgetId }} from the queue link).
No files exceed 700 lines (largest: BudgetChangeDetail.jsx at 378). DRY is respected — BCRLineEditor reused across Create + Edit dialogs.
All interactive elements carry data-testid (bcr-{component}-{purpose} kebab-case) — excellent test surface coverage.
test_credentials: test-pm@example.test / TestUser-Dev-2026! — PM has all 6 budget_changes.* perms, bypasses MFA enrollment. Verified live.
seed_data_creation: Created 3 BCRs via the UI on budget 5a329b39…: 1× Transfer (+500/-500), 1× Adjustment (+100), 1× Adjustment (+50, then Withdrawn). BCR-0001 was advanced from Draft → Submitted. Re-running the suite will accumulate further test BCRs — consider a teardown helper if rerun frequently.
context_for_next_testing_agent: BCR frontend slice is GREEN end-to-end. The Apply step (Approved → Applied) was NOT exercised because the only available PM user is the BCR creator and the £10k-boundary self-approval guard correctly blocks self-approve; to test Apply, log in as a second non-creator approver (test-director or test-finance once MFA-enrolled, or test-admin), approve the Submitted BCR-0001, then return as test-pm/test-admin to click bcr-actions-apply-btn. Three notable console warnings (Radix Dialog a11y, Select uncontrolled→controlled) — non-blocking. API path pin verified clean — every BCR call uses /api/v1/budget-changes.
rca of the issue: n/a — no critical issue found this iteration.
